40+Projects Done
The Studio

Design Born from Intention

Kavya Dubey Interiors is a Jammu-based design studio dedicated to creating spaces of quiet distinction. I believe great interiors emerge from deep listening - understanding how clients live, dream, and desire their world to feel.

From intimate residential projects to bold commercial transformations, each space is a singular expression of its inhabitant - elevated by considered material choices, masterful spatial planning, and an unwavering eye for detail.

With 40+ projects spanning residential homes, commercial spaces, pooja rooms, kitchens, and beyond - every design is bespoke, conceived from scratch, and executed with passion.

What We Do

Our Services

01 🏠

Residential Design

Full-scope interior design for homes, apartments, and villas. Transforming living spaces into personal sanctuaries that balance beauty with daily life.

Inquire
02 🏢

Commercial Spaces

Offices, retail environments, and boutiques designed to embody your brand while delivering exceptional experiences for every visitor.

Inquire
03 🍳

Kitchen and Bath

Precision-designed kitchens and bathrooms with thoughtful layouts, premium materials, and details that elevate every moment of use.

Inquire
04 🨶

Pooja Room Design

Sacred spaces designed with devotion - from intimate home mandirs to grand dedicated pooja rooms, crafted with reverence and artistry.

Inquire
05 📐

2D and 3D Drawings

Detailed technical drawings and photorealistic 3D visualizations that bring your space to life before a single wall is touched.

Inquire
06 🔨

Turnkey Execution

From concept to completion - full project management, vendor coordination, and quality oversight delivered on time and on vision.

Inquire
How We Work

Our Process

01

Discovery

A deep conversation about your vision, lifestyle, and aspirations. We listen carefully before we sketch a single line.

02

Concept

Mood boards, space plans, and material palettes translating your brief into a cohesive and inspired design direction.

03

Design

Detailed 2D drawings and photorealistic 3D renders - every dimension and material resolved before execution begins.

04

Execution

Hands-on project management ensuring your space is delivered exactly as designed, on time and to the highest standard.

Client Stories

What They Say

★★★★★

Kavya Dubey was a young professional at first look, and we were a bit apprehensive. But she immediately asked all the right questions and we realised she would capture our requirements perfectly. She was very attentive, understanding, and skilled - providing detailed visual proposals showing different perspectives that helped us visualise in real time. The renovation changed our home both aesthetically and in comfort. It went so smooth and lasting - we never felt we missed anything. She is still a very special person for us!

D
Dinesh Singh Bisht
Residential Project - Gurugram
★★★★★

We started with a completely raw flat, and honestly could not have imagined it turning out this way. You made the entire process smooth and stress-free, understanding exactly what we needed. What we have now is a beautiful, functional space that truly feels like home.

J
Jatin Malhotra
Residential Project - Gurugram
★★★★★

I worked with Kavya Interiors for the 3D design of my house and had a very good experience. Their team was creative, understood my requirements well, and delivered realistic designs that made visualization easy. They were responsive and professional throughout, and there was absolutely no pressure regarding payments. Highly recommend their services.
